pattern_name: Free indirect discourse signatures per beat-kind

marker_definitions.interrogative_fragments: ?-terminated sentences with <8 words, OUTSIDE quoted spans
marker_definitions.exclamatory_fragments: !-terminated sentences with <8 words, OUTSIDE quoted spans
marker_definitions.modal_hedges: regex hits on (surely|perhaps|maybe|indeed|of course|undoubtedly|no doubt|how could|how would|why would|why should|how should|certainly), OUTSIDE quoted spans
marker_definitions.bare_adversative_openers: sentences whose first word is one of (But, And, Yet, Still, So) — case-sensitive, OUTSIDE quoted spans
marker_definitions.self_addressed_modals: modal verbs (must|should|cannot|could not|dare not|will not|shall not|cannot have|might have|may have) NOT preceded by an explicit pronoun subject and NOT preceded by a proper-noun token; OUTSIDE quoted spans

stage2_llm_classification.reason: Stage-1 markers reproduced known directional findings (P39 conjunction-first 1.6x interiority>action, P59 interiority question-mid-rank, P61 modal-past interiority>action 2x). Methodology guidance permits skipping Stage 2.
